tasks.title: Add PriceRangeEnum and ProductDomainEnum core enums
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/enums/price-range.enum.ts` (BUDGET|MID|HIGH|PREMIUM) + `.schema.ts`, and `packages/schemas/src/enums/product-domain.enum.ts` (accommodation|commerce) + `.schema.ts`. Mirror an existing enum file pair exactly. Export from the enums barrel. Tests: `packages/schemas/test/enums/price-range.test.ts` + `product-domain.test.ts` asserting each value parses and an invalid value rejects.

tasks.title: Add CommerceEntityType core enum
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/enums/commerce-entity-type.enum.ts` (gastronomy|experience) + `.schema.ts` used by the link table and admin shell discriminator. Export from barrel. Tests: `packages/schemas/test/enums/commerce-entity-type.test.ts` asserting both values parse and invalid rejects.

tasks.title: Add GastronomyTypeEnum gastro enum
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/enums/gastronomy-type.enum.ts` (RESTAURANT, BAR, CAFE, PARRILLA, CERVECERIA, HELADERIA, PANADERIA, ROTISERIA, FOOD_TRUCK) + `.schema.ts`. Export from barrel. Tests: `packages/schemas/test/enums/gastronomy-type.test.ts` asserting each value parses and invalid rejects.

tasks.title: Create OpeningHoursSchema core common schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/common/opening-hours.schema.ts` exporting `OpeningHoursSchema` (timezone optional default America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires, days mon..sun each {closed bool, shifts:[{open HHmm, close HHmm}]}, notes, notesI18n) + `OpeningHoursFields` spread const. Export from common barrel. Tests: `packages/schemas/test/common/opening-hours.test.ts` covering valid week, closed day, multiple shifts, invalid HHmm rejection, and open>=close edge case.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests incl edge cases

tasks.title: Create CommerceRatingSchema core common schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/common/commerce-rating.schema.ts` exporting `CommerceRatingSchema` ({food, service, ambiance, value} each 0-5). Export from common barrel. Tests: `packages/schemas/test/common/commerce-rating.test.ts` asserting valid breakdown, boundary 0 and 5 accepted, 6 and negative rejected.

tasks.title: Create CommerceIdentityFields core common schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/common/commerce-identity.schema.ts` exporting `CommerceIdentityFields` spread const (name, slug, summary, description, richDescription + matching *I18n jsonb fields + translationMeta), mirroring accommodation identity shape. Export from common barrel. Tests: `packages/schemas/test/common/commerce-identity.test.ts` asserting a z.object spread of the fields parses a valid identity and rejects missing required name/slug.

tasks.title: Add COMMERCE_OWNER role to RoleEnum
tasks.description: Add `COMMERCE_OWNER` to `packages/schemas/src/enums/role.enum.ts` (+ its `.schema.ts` if separate). Do NOT overload HOST. Tests: extend `packages/schemas/test/enums/role.test.ts` (or create) asserting COMMERCE_OWNER parses and is distinct from HOST.

tasks.title: Add COMMERCE_* permissions + category to PermissionEnum
tasks.description: Add the granular `COMMERCE_*` permission constants (operational EDIT_OWN sections: schedule/contact/social/media/menu/priceRange/richDescription/amenities/features/faqs, plus admin COMMERCE_*_CREATE/VIEW_ALL/EDIT_ALL/DELETE/MODERATE_REVIEW) and a `COMMERCE` PermissionCategoryEnum value to `packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts`. Tests: extend `packages/schemas/test/enums/permission.test.ts` asserting the new constants parse and the category exists.

tasks.title: Map COMMERCE_OWNER role to COMMERCE_* permissions in seed
tasks.description: Add the COMMERCE_OWNER → COMMERCE_*_EDIT_OWN operational-only mapping (plus ACCESS_PANEL_ADMIN, BILLING_VIEW_OWN as appropriate) in `packages/seed/src/required/rolePermissions.seed.ts`. Do NOT grant identity/core or admin perms. Tests: `packages/seed/test/rolePermissions.test.ts` (or extend) asserting COMMERCE_OWNER has ONLY the operational set and lacks any identity/lifecycle/admin permission.

tasks.title: Create GastronomySchema main entity schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/gastronomy/gastronomy.schema.ts` composing by spread: CommerceIdentityFields + gastro fields (type via GastronomyTypeEnum, priceRange, menuUrl https-validated nullable) + BaseContactFields + SocialNetworkFields + OpeningHoursFields + media + BaseReviewFields + Lifecycle/Moderation/Visibility/Seo/Admin/Tags/Audit + destinationId + ownerId + isFeatured. Tests: `packages/schemas/test/entities/gastronomy/gastronomy.schema.test.ts` asserting a full valid entity parses and required-field omissions reject.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy admin + operational CRUD schemas
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/gastronomy/gastronomy.crud.schema.ts`: admin Create (identity/core + ownerId/destinationId/type + optional amenityIds/featureIds), operational owner Update via `.pick()` (schedule/contact/social/media/menuUrl/priceRange/richDescription/amenityIds/featureIds ONLY — identity/core fields ABSENT so forged values rejected pre-service), plus Patch/Delete/Restore. Tests: `gastronomy.crud.schema.test.ts` asserting owner-update rejects a forged `name`/`slug`/`type` and admin-create requires identity fields.

subtasks.title: Test forged-field rejection on owner update

tasks.title: Create gastronomy HTTP schema with completeness check
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/gastronomy/gastronomy.http.schema.ts`: flat HTTP coercion + `httpToDomain*` converters with the compile-time completeness check (`Exclude<DomainFields, HttpConversionFields>` resolves to never). Tests: `gastronomy.http.schema.test.ts` asserting a flat HTTP payload coerces to the domain shape and the converter round-trips type/priceRange/openingHours.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy query + admin-search schemas
tasks.description: Create `gastronomy.query.schema.ts` (GastronomySearchSchema: destination/type/priceRange/amenity/feature filters + list/summary/stats) and `gastronomy.admin-search.schema.ts` (AdminSearchBaseSchema.extend({type?, destinationId?, priceRange?, ownerId?, isFeatured?})). Tests: `gastronomy.query.schema.test.ts` asserting filter params parse, defaults apply, and unknown admin params reject.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy three-tier access schemas
tasks.description: Create `gastronomy.access.schema.ts` with GastronomyPublicSchema (omits adminInfo, private contactInfo, audit) / GastronomyProtectedSchema / GastronomyAdminSchema using `.pick()`/`.omit()` discipline mirroring accommodation. Tests: `gastronomy.access.schema.test.ts` asserting the public tier strips adminInfo/audit and the admin tier retains them.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy options/relations/batch schemas
tasks.description: Create `gastronomy.options.schema.ts`, `gastronomy.relations.schema.ts`, `gastronomy.batch.schema.ts` mirroring accommodation's equivalents. Tests: `gastronomy.relations.schema.test.ts` asserting relation shapes (destination, owner, amenities, features) parse and batch I/O validates.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy FAQ subtype schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/gastronomy/subtypes/gastronomy.faq.schema.ts` as `BaseFaqSchema.extend({ id, gastronomyId })` plus Add/Update/Remove/List/Reorder I/O schemas (reorder uses display_order). Tests: `gastronomy.faq.schema.test.ts` asserting add requires question/answer and reorder accepts an ordered id list.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy review subtype schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/gastronomy/subtypes/gastronomy.review.schema.ts` using `CommerceRatingSchema` for the rating breakdown plus Create/Update/Moderate/List I/O. Default moderationState PENDING. Tests: `gastronomy.review.schema.test.ts` asserting the rating breakdown validates and a create input omits moderation fields (server-controlled).

tasks.title: Create CommerceLeadSchema core lead schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/commerce-lead/commerce-lead.schema.ts` + `commerce-lead.crud.schema.ts` exporting CommerceLeadSchema + CommerceLeadCreateInputSchema with a `domain` discriminator (default 'gastronomy'), fields businessName/contactName/email/phone/destinationId nullable/message + handledAt/handledById/audit. Tests: `commerce-lead.schema.test.ts` asserting create validates required fields, domain defaults to gastronomy, and email format enforced.

subtasks.title: Define create input with domain discriminator

tasks.title: Add commerce schema env-registry entries
tasks.description: Register `HOSPEDA_COMMERCE_LEAD_NOTIFY_EMAIL` and `HOSPEDA_COMMERCE_PLAN_ID` in `packages/config/src/env-registry.*.ts` with full metadata (description/type/required/secret/defaultValue/exampleValue/apps/category), add Zod validation in `apps/api/src/utils/env.ts`, and `.env.example` placeholders. Tests: run `pnpm env:check:registry` green. NOTE: after this task STOP and tell owner to set values in Coolify.

subtasks.title: Register both env vars in env-registry
Add Zod validation in apps/api env.ts

tasks.title: Add users.must_change_password structural migration
tasks.description: Add `must_change_password boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false` to the users dbschema in `packages/db/src/schemas/` (structural carril). Run `pnpm db:generate`, commit the migration file. Tests: `packages/db/test/` schema test asserting the column default false and the migration drift guard is clean (db:generate produces no further diff).

tasks.title: Create gastronomies dbschema table
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/schemas/gastronomy/gastronomy.dbschema.ts`: uuid PK defaultRandom, slug unique, identity text cols + *I18n jsonb, pg enums gastronomy_type/price_range + reused visibility/lifecycle/moderation, jsonb contact/social/openingHours/media/seo/admin, destinationId/ownerId FK onDelete restrict, is_featured, reviews_count int 0, average_rating numeric(3,2) mode number 0, soft delete deleted_at + audit, index set mirroring accommodation. Tests: `packages/db/test/gastronomy.dbschema.test.ts` asserting columns/enums/indexes present.

tasks.title: Create commerce_listing_subscriptions link dbschema
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/schemas/commerce/commerce_listing_subscriptions.dbschema.ts`: id, subscriptionId FK→billing_subscriptions, productDomain ('commerce'), entityType (CommerceEntityType), entityId uuid, status mirror, createdAt/updatedAt, UNIQUE(entityType, entityId), index entityId/status. Tests: `commerce_listing_subscriptions.dbschema.test.ts` asserting unique constraint + indexes.

tasks.title: Create commerce_lead dbschema table
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/schemas/commerce/commerce_lead.dbschema.ts`: id, domain, businessName, contactName, email, phone, destinationId nullable FK, message, handledAt, handledById FK, audit. Indexes: domain, handledAt. Tests: `commerce_lead.dbschema.test.ts` asserting columns + nullable destinationId.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy review + faq dbschemas
tasks.description: Create `gastronomy_review.dbschema.ts` (FK gastronomy cascade, userId set-null, title/content nullable, rating jsonb, averageRating numeric, lifecycleState ACTIVE, moderationState default PENDING + moderatedBy/At/Reason, audit, adminInfo, UNIQUE(userId,gastronomyId), indexes) and `gastronomy_faq.dbschema.ts` (FK cascade, question/answer notNull, category nullable, display_order int nullable, lifecycleState ACTIVE, adminInfo, audit, indexes gastronomyId/category). Tests: dbschema tests asserting cascade, unique, default PENDING.

tasks.title: Create gastronomy amenity/feature junction dbschemas
tasks.description: Create `r_gastronomy_amenity.dbschema.ts` (composite PK (gastronomyId, amenityId), both FK cascade) + `r_gastronomy_feature.dbschema.ts` (composite PK (gastronomyId, featureId), FK cascade), reusing existing amenities/features catalogs. Tests: dbschema tests asserting composite PK + cascade FKs.

tasks.title: Add billing_subscriptions.product_domain via extras carril
tasks.description: Add `product_domain varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'accommodation'` to `billing_subscriptions` via a hand-written idempotent migration in `packages/db/src/migrations/extras/` (`ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ...`) because the table is library-owned (@qazuor/qzpay-drizzle). Confirm carril at impl (micro-decision 1, default extras). Tests: `packages/db/test/extras/product-domain.test.ts` asserting column exists with default after db:apply-extras.

tasks.title: Generate + apply gastronomy/commerce migrations
tasks.description: Run `pnpm db:generate` for the structural new tables (gastronomies, gastronomy_review/faq, junctions, commerce_listing_subscriptions, commerce_lead), commit the migration, then `pnpm db:migrate` + `pnpm db:apply-extras` (product_domain). Tests: assert db:generate yields no residual drift and a smoke query against each new table succeeds in `packages/db/test/`.

subtasks.title: Assert no residual drift + smoke query

tasks.title: Create gastronomy + commerce Drizzle models
tasks.description: Create models extending BaseModel for gastronomy, gastronomy_review, gastronomy_faq, junctions, commerce_listing_subscriptions, commerce_lead under `packages/db/src/models/`. Soft delete by default. Tests: `packages/db/test/models/gastronomy.model.test.ts` covering findById/findAll/create/softDelete against a real test DB.

tasks.title: Implement BaseCommerceListingService skeleton + lifecycle hooks
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/commerce/base-commerce-listing.service.ts` exporting `abstract class BaseCommerceListingService<Entity,Model,Create,Update,Search> extends BaseCrudService`. Implement shared lifecycle hooks: destination CITY validation, slug generation, junction id capture into hookState (pendingAmenityIds/pendingFeatureIds), public-tier projection. ZERO gastro-specific logic (AC-9.1). Tests: `packages/service-core/test/commerce/base-commerce-listing.service.test.ts` asserting slug gen + CITY validation + hookState capture.

subtasks.title: Define abstract base class extends BaseCrudService
Implement slug gen + destination CITY validation hooks

tasks.title: Implement generic commerce permissions module
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/commerce/commerce.permissions.ts` exporting generic `checkCanEditOperational(actor, listing)`, `checkCanViewOwn`, `checkCanAdmin*` etc., all using `hasPermission(actor, PermissionEnum.COMMERCE_*)` — NEVER role checks. Tests: `commerce.permissions.test.ts` asserting an actor with only operational perms passes operational but fails identity/admin checks.

tasks.title: Implement generic commerce junction-sync helper
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/commerce/commerce.junction-sync.ts` exporting generic `syncAmenityJunction`/`syncFeatureJunction` parametrized by junction table + catalog model, run inside withServiceTransaction (undefined=no-op, []=clear, [ids]=sync). Tests: `commerce.junction-sync.test.ts` asserting the three modes against a passed-in table.

tasks.title: Implement commerce-visibility reconciler
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/commerce/commerce-visibility.ts`: given a subscription-status change for a listing (looked up via commerce_listing_subscriptions link), flip listing visibility/lifecycleState (active→PUBLIC/ACTIVE, otherwise hidden). INDEPENDENT of the entitlement engine (US-4 / AC-4.5). Tests: `commerce-visibility.test.ts` asserting active→visible and cancel/expire→hidden, data preserved.

tasks.title: Implement commerce-lead service
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/commerce/commerce-lead.service.ts` (BaseService/stateless-helper style): create lead + fire ops notification via @repo/notifications + admin list/mark-handled. Returns ServiceOutput<T>. Tests: `commerce-lead.service.test.ts` asserting create stores a lead, notification is invoked (mocked), and mark-handled sets handledAt/handledById.

tasks.title: Add product_domain filter to accommodation entitlement reads
tasks.description: Add `product_domain='accommodation'` filter to every accommodation-side subscription read: `loadEntitlements()`, accommodation start-paid/poll/webhook, and dunning paths touching accommodation entitlements (in `packages/billing`, `apps/api/src/routes/billing/`, crons). Do NOT refactor to multi-domain. Tests covered separately in T-051. Unit test here: assert the query builder includes the product_domain predicate in `packages/billing/test/`.

tasks.title: Implement GastronomyService extends BaseCommerceListingService
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/gastronomy/gastronomy.service.ts` extending BaseCommerceListingService. Adds ONLY: gastro field handling (type/priceRange/menuUrl), its junction tables wiring, gastro search filters, forced owner-scoping in `_executeAdminSearch` for *_VIEW_OWN actors. Tests: `gastronomy.service.test.ts` covering create/update + forced owner scoping (non-owner→404).

tasks.title: Wire gastronomy junction sync + operational-only enforcement
tasks.description: Wire `gastronomy.service.ts` to call the generic junction-sync with r_gastronomy_amenity/feature tables, and enforce operational-only owner updates (identity/core forged fields server-side rejected, complementing the schema absence). Tests: extend `gastronomy.service.test.ts` asserting amenity/feature sync (add/clear) and that an owner update touching `name`/`type` is rejected with a clear code.

subtasks.title: Wire gastro junction tables to generic sync

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy FAQ service helpers
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/gastronomy/gastronomy.faq.ts` helpers: add (display_order max+1), update, remove, reorder (NULLS LAST read order), list. Owner-editable. Tests: `gastronomy.faq.test.ts` covering add ordering, reorder, and owner-scope enforcement.

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy projections + permissions module
tasks.description: Create `gastronomy.projections.ts` (public-tier projection / location privacy using the access schemas) and `gastronomy.permissions.ts` (thin, delegates to commerce permission helpers with gastronomy permission constants). Tests: `gastronomy.projections.test.ts` asserting public projection strips adminInfo/private contact; `gastronomy.permissions.test.ts` asserting delegation.

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy review service + denormalized rating recompute
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/gastronomy/gastronomy.review.ts`: create (→PENDING, UNIQUE userId/gastronomyId), moderate approve/reject, and recompute averageRating/reviewsCount from APPROVED rows only on approve/update/delete via service hooks. Tests: `gastronomy.review.test.ts` covering one-review-per-user, PENDING default, and rating recompute counting only approved.

tasks.title: Implement commerce-owner-provisioning service
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/commerce/commerce-owner-provisioning.service.ts`: create a COMMERCE_OWNER user with a temp password + `must_change_password=true` via Better Auth, email credentials via @repo/notifications (i18n). Tests: `commerce-owner-provisioning.service.test.ts` asserting user created with role+flag and credential email invoked (mocked).

tasks.title: Implement must_change_password gate + change-password endpoint
tasks.description: Build the force-password-change gate: validate Better Auth native support first; otherwise a session/route middleware (in apps/api protected router) that blocks every protected route except change-password while the flag is true, plus `POST /api/v1/protected/auth/change-password-required` that enforces the password policy and clears the flag (US-3). Tests: integration test in `apps/api/test/` asserting a flagged user hitting any protected route gets redirected/403 with a clear code (AC-3.4 regression), and clearing the flag unblocks.

subtasks.title: Validate Better Auth native vs custom gate

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy public API routes
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/gastronomy/public/` (one file per endpoint, index re-export) using createPublicRoute: list (visible only), :id, slug/:slug, destination/:destinationId, :id/reviews, :id/faqs, stats. Use GastronomyPublicSchema projection; hidden listings 404. Tests: `apps/api/test/gastronomy/public.test.ts` asserting visible-only filtering and 404 on hidden detail.

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy protected owner API routes
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/gastronomy/protected/` using createProtectedRoute: PATCH :id (owner operational-only update), GET :id (owner view). Forced owner scoping (non-owner→403/404). Tests: `apps/api/test/gastronomy/protected.test.ts` asserting owner can patch operational fields, forged identity field rejected, and non-owner gets 403/404.

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy protected FAQ + review API routes
tasks.description: Create owner FAQ routes (POST/PUT/DELETE /:id/faqs[/:faqId], PUT /:id/faqs/reorder) and tourist review route (POST /:id/reviews → PENDING) under `apps/api/src/routes/gastronomy/protected/`. Tests: `apps/api/test/gastronomy/protected-faq-review.test.ts` asserting FAQ CRUD/reorder owner-scoped and one-review-per-user enforced.

subtasks.title: Create owner FAQ CRUD + reorder routes

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy admin CRUD API routes
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/gastronomy/admin/` using createAdminRoute/createAdminListRoute with requiredPermissions: list/create, GET/PUT/PATCH/DELETE :id, DELETE :id/hard, POST :id/restore, POST batch, GET options. AdminSearchBaseSchema params (page/pageSize). Tests: `apps/api/test/gastronomy/admin.test.ts` asserting permission gating and admin can edit identity/core fields.

tasks.title: Implement gastronomy admin review + assign-owner routes
tasks.description: Create admin review routes (GET reviews, GET/PUT/DELETE reviews/:id, POST reviews/:id/moderate) and `POST /api/v1/admin/gastronomies/:id/assign-owner` (set/replace COMMERCE_OWNER) under `apps/api/src/routes/gastronomy/admin/`. Tests: `apps/api/test/gastronomy/admin-review-owner.test.ts` asserting moderation flips state + rating recompute and assign-owner reassigns ownerId.

tasks.title: Implement commerce lead public + admin API routes
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/commerce/` lead routes: public `POST /api/v1/public/commerce/leads` (createPublicRoute, honeypot/throttle spam guard, US-1) and admin `GET /api/v1/admin/commerce/leads` + `POST /…/leads/:id/handle` (createAdminRoute). Tests: `apps/api/test/commerce/leads.test.ts` asserting public intake validates+notifies (mocked) and admin can list/mark-handled.

subtasks.title: Create public lead intake route + spam guard
Create admin lead list + handle routes

tasks.title: Implement admin commerce start-subscription route
tasks.description: Create `POST /api/v1/admin/commerce/listings/:entityType/:entityId/start-subscription` (createAdminRoute) reusing the start-paid MP preapproval machinery, setting product_domain='commerce' (micro-decision 2: new route, default). Tests: `apps/api/test/commerce/start-subscription.test.ts` asserting it provisions a commerce-domain subscription via the existing machinery (MP stubbed).

tasks.title: Seed commerce plan + link-row creation on subscription start
tasks.description: Seed one commerce plan (MP preapproval recurring) referenced by HOSPEDA_COMMERCE_PLAN_ID, and on commerce subscription start create a `commerce_listing_subscriptions` link row (UNIQUE per entity). Wire in `packages/seed/` + `packages/billing`. Tests: `packages/billing/test/commerce-plan.test.ts` asserting plan seeds and a link row is created with product_domain='commerce'.

subtasks.title: Create link row on subscription start

tasks.title: Wire webhook/cron to commerce-visibility reconciler
tasks.description: Invoke the commerce-visibility reconciler from the existing MP webhook + dunning/finalize crons whenever a product_domain='commerce' subscription changes status (apps/api webhook + cron jobs). Tests: `apps/api/test/commerce/visibility-wiring.test.ts` asserting active→listing visible and cancel/dunning→listing hidden (integration, MP stub).

subtasks.title: Hook reconciler into MP webhook path

tasks.title: Add entitlement-isolation regression test (host + commerce)
tasks.description: HIGH-RISK gate (AC-4.4). Write a regression test in `packages/billing/test/` (or apps/api integration) asserting a customer with BOTH an accommodation sub AND a commerce sub resolves accommodation entitlements IDENTICALLY to a customer with only the accommodation sub. The commerce subscription must never enter loadEntitlements(). Tests: explicit assertion that entitlements are byte-equal across the two scenarios.

tasks.title: Add commerce i18n locale files (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add `gastronomy.json` (GASTRO listing/detail copy) and `commerce.json` (CORE: lead form, credentials email, change-password copy, subscription/visibility states) under `@repo/i18n` for es/en/pt. Tests: i18n key-parity test asserting all three locales have identical key sets for both files.

tasks.title: Build /gastronomia listing page (web)
tasks.description: Create `apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/gastronomia/index.astro` (SSR-fetches the public list endpoint, filters via querystring: destination/type/priceRange/amenity) + `GastronomyCard.astro`. CSS Modules / scoped <style> + design tokens, NO Tailwind. i18n via @repo/i18n. Tests: `apps/web/test/pages/gastronomia-index.test.ts` asserting the page renders cards and applies filters.

tasks.title: Build /gastronomia detail page + blocks (web)
tasks.description: Create `apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/gastronomia/[slug].astro` + detail blocks: `OpeningHours.astro` (today-highlighted), contact/social/menu/amenities/FAQs/reviews blocks reusing existing review/FAQ components where possible. 404 when hidden. CSS Modules + tokens, no Tailwind. Tests: `apps/web/test/pages/gastronomia-detail.test.ts` asserting detail renders all blocks and 404s on hidden.

tasks.title: Build change-password-required screen (web)
tasks.description: Create the CORE change-password-required screen in `apps/web/` shown when the session must_change_password flag is set, blocking other routes until done (native HTML form + small hook, web convention). Posts to the protected change-password endpoint. Tests: `apps/web/test/` asserting the screen renders when flag set and submitting clears the gate.

tasks.title: Build public lead form page (web)
tasks.description: Create the CORE 'Publicá tu restaurante' lead form page/section in `apps/web/` (native HTML form + small hook + honeypot) posting to the public commerce lead endpoint. Generic copy reusable by SPEC-240. CSS Modules + tokens, i18n. Tests: `apps/web/test/` asserting the form validates required fields and submits to the lead endpoint.

subtasks.title: Create lead form page + hook + honeypot

tasks.title: Build generic commerce admin Entity shell config layer
tasks.description: Create the CORE generic commerce Entity shell config in `apps/admin/` so gastronomy (and later experiencias) register list/view/edit/create by CONFIG, reusing the existing EntityView/EntityEdit shell family (AC-8.3). Identity/core sections admin-enabled; operational sections shared. Tests: `apps/admin/test/` asserting the shell renders from a config object without forking shell code.

tasks.title: Build admin lead inbox + owner-provisioning UX
tasks.description: Create the CORE lead inbox view (list + mark-handled) and the owner-provisioning UX inside the create flow (create/pick user → fields → send credentials) in `apps/admin/`. TanStack Query + Form, Tailwind, shadcn. Tests: `apps/admin/test/` asserting lead list renders + mark-handled mutates and the provisioning step creates/picks a user.

tasks.title: Build gastronomy admin routes (fields/filters)
tasks.description: Create `apps/admin/src/routes/.../gastronomies/` declaring the shell config + gastro-specific fields (type/priceRange/menuUrl) and filters (destination/type/priceRange/featured/ownerId). TanStack Form + Zod from @repo/schemas, Tailwind, shadcn. Tests: `apps/admin/test/gastronomies.test.ts` asserting create/edit forms validate via the gastro schemas and filters apply.

tasks.title: Write cross-layer E2E test for gastronomy flow
tasks.description: Write an E2E/integration test spanning admin-create → owner provision → start subscription (MP stub) → active→visible → public listing/detail render → owner operational edit → review submit→moderate→rating recompute. Place in `apps/api/test/` or `apps/web/test/` integration suite. Asserts the full admin-sells lifecycle end-to-end.

tasks.title: Execute staging MP smoke for commerce subscription (SPEC-143)
tasks.description: Per SPEC-143 billing rules, run the relevant staging-smoke sections for the commerce subscription surface against the MP sandbox (start-subscription → active webhook → visible, cancel → hidden).
